changelog:
Fix: avoid blocking Jellyfin's thread pool during PDF rendering
- GetImageResponse now offloads synchronous PDF rendering (PDFtoImage/SkiaSharp) to Task.Run so ASP.NET thread pool threads are never blocked
- EnsureThumbnailExistsAsync is now properly async (was fake-async, blocking caller thread)
- PDF rendering now respects CancellationToken; requests cancelled by Jellyfin abort early
- Fix: pageStream MemoryStream is now properly disposed after use
description: Automatically generates cover thumbnails for PDF files in your Jellyfin library by rendering the first page of each PDF. Supports configurable render resolution (DPI) and thumbnail padding mode.
name: PDF Thumbnails
overview: Generates thumbnail images from the first page of PDF files.
